scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -f .next/standalone/server.js ]; then node .next/standalone/server.js; elif [ -f .next/standalone/apps/web/server.js ]; then node .next/standalone/apps/web/server.js; else echo "Standalone server.js not found"; find .next/standalone -maxdepth 6 -name server.js -print; exit 1; fi'
